title: Property Consultant - Anarock Property Consultants - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Anarock Property Consultants - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Property Consultant looking for your next big career move? Anarock Property Consultants in Kochi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Anarock Property Consultants:
Anarock Property Consultants is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Anarock Property Consultants!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
